Title: Adaptation Planning Grant Program - Office of Land Use and Climate ...
Description: ICARP Grant Programs Adaptation Planning Grant Program This program provides funding to help fill local, regional, and tribal planning needs, provides communities the resources to identify climate resilience priorities, and supports the development of a pipeline of climate resilient infrastructure projects across the state.

Title: Funding Opportunity | U.S. Climate Resilience Toolkit
Description: A range of federal agencies and organizations commonly offer funding for climate adaptation or resilience-building projects. Check the external links below for opportunities that align with your needs.

Title: NOAA Climate Resilience Regional Challenge
Description: Funding / Climate Resilience Regional Challenge NOAA Climate Resilience Regional Challenge This competitive grant program is focused on collaborative projects that increase the resilience of coastal communities to extreme weather and other climate change impacts, including sea level rise and drought.

Title: Community Climate Resilience Grant Program - King County
Description: About the program The Community Climate Resilience (CCR) Grant Program is intended for frontline communities, defined as those that are disproportionately impacted by climate change due to existing and historic racial, social, environmental, and economic inequities, and who have limited resources and limited capacity to adapt. Title: Prince George's County Community Resilience Hub Grant Program ...
Description: Resilience Hubs are trusted community-serving facilities that support residents before, during, and after local climate-related events.
